title: teucrium chowii
intro: Teucrium chowii, also known as Himalayan gillia or Teucrium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Teucrium chowii include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Teucrium chowii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
